name: Post-Matric Scholarship
short_desc: Central government scholarship for students who have passed Class 10, covering tuition and maintenance costs for further studies.
benefit: Tuition fee reimbursement + monthly maintenance allowance
source: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) – Post Matric Scholarship Scheme guidelines

name: Fee Reimbursement Scheme
short_desc: State-run scheme that reimburses tuition fees for economically weaker students enrolled in recognized colleges.
benefit: Full or partial reimbursement of tuition fees each academic year
source: State Fee Reimbursement Scheme (AP/Telangana ePASS – Jnanabhumi) eligibility rules

name: Skill Development Program
short_desc: Free certified short-term training in industry-relevant skills, with placement support after course completion.
benefit: Free certified skill training + job placement assistance
source: Skill India Digital / PMKVY (Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana) guidelines

name: Merit Scholarship
short_desc: One-time award recognizing strong academic performance in Class 12, open to all categories and states.
benefit: One-time merit-based cash award for top academic performers
source: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships for College and University Students

name: Student Financial Assistance Program
short_desc: Emergency financial aid fund supporting students from low-income households with fees, books, and essentials.
benefit: Emergency financial aid for fees, books, and essential study materials
source: State Student Welfare / Financial Assistance Fund guidelines
